creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
(In reply to Tatsuki Makino from comment #3)
> Then I saw somewhere that somewhere between the 2.13 and 2.69 versions of autoconf it was changed...

One of the somewhere in there is likely to be this. I remember seeing more elsewhere... :)

https://www.gnu.org/software/autoconf/manual/autoconf-2.60/html_node/Changed-Directory-Variables.html
> In Autoconf 2.60, the set of directory variables has changed, ... and mandir are now expressed in terms of datarootdir.

Note that the base man command now accepts both, so it does not mean that one is wrong. Maybe :)
